overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a survivor walking along an abandoned mountain highway at night, crossing a bridge over a river canyon. The scene features rocky cliffs, pine forests, and abandoned vehicles in a post-apocalyptic game setting with atmospheric blue-grey lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain highway with rocky cliffs and pine forest

events.description: character moves from dirt shoulder onto the paved highway surface
approaching bridge structure with guardrails becoming visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain road with a rifle and backpack, moving past an abandoned truck

notable_agents.action: abandoned green pickup truck parked on the road shoulder with open doors

entered.detail: steep rocky mountain face with sparse vegetation rising beside the road
dense evergreen forest covering the hillside
two-lane asphalt road with double yellow center lines
derelict green pickup truck parked on the shoulder
wooden telephone pole with power lines running along the road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an abandoned mountain highway at night, flanked by steep rocky cliffs on the left and pine forests on the right. The camera follows from behind as the character passes a derelict green pickup truck and approaches a bridge structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge over river canyon with metal guardrails

events.description: character slows and looks over the bridge guardrail at the river canyon below
character turns back to face forward and continues walking across the bridge

agents.ego_description: walking across the bridge and pausing to look down at the river flowing through the canyon below

entered.detail: metal guardrails lining both sides of the bridge deck
deep gorge with dark water flowing below the bridge
elevated bridge surface with concrete barriers

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bridge spanning a deep river canyon, with metal guardrails visible on both sides. The camera pans to show the river flowing below as the character pauses to look over the edge, then continues across the bridge with the rocky cliff face now closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain highway with road signs and abandoned vehicles

events.description: speed limit sign becomes visible on the right side of the road
passing an abandoned blue sedan parked on the right shoulder

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway past road signs and abandoned cars in the distance

entered.detail: white rectangular road sign displaying speed limit 45
derelict blue sedan parked on the road shoulder
large white signboard with text on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the character continues along the open highway where a speed limit sign and abandoned vehicles become visible. The road stretches ahead through the forested mountain terrain, with the rocky cliffs now further in the background and new abandoned cars appearing on the roadside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate mountain highway that transitions from a narrow cliffside pass to an expansive bridge crossing and back into an open forested road. It begins by following a character from behind as they pass a derelict green pickup truck, flanked by steep rocky cliffs and dense pine forests. As the character advances, the scene shifts onto a bridge spanning a deep river canyon, where the camera pans down to reveal the flowing water below before continuing past the metal guardrails. The perspective then expands as the character exits the bridge, moving toward a speed limit sign and a scattering of abandoned vehicles. Finally, the road stretches forward through the mountain terrain, with the rocky cliffs receding into the background as more derelict cars appear along the roadside.
